--- Vampire — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.

→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:20+3=23 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:2+-2=0 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:9+-2=7 vs DC 15] FAIL!

REASONING: Throwing rock at Vampire — Iron Concentration (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:11+9=20 vs AC 14] HIT! 23 damage. Vampire — Iron Concentration HP: 44/67
→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):12+8=20 vs DC 11] MAINTAINED!
